message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.geomspace passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-e3gs)

Adds a new `geomspace` PyO3 function in `crates/fnp-python/src/lib.rs`
that passes through to `numpy.geomspace(start, stop, num=50,
endpoint=True, dtype=None, axis=0)` so the parity wrapper inherits
NumPy's exact semantics for logarithmic spacing, including:

- Positive/scalar endpoints
- Negative and complex endpoint handling (where numpy supports them)
- `endpoint=True`/`endpoint=False` last-point inclusion
- Explicit `dtype` coercion
- `axis` insertion when `start`/`stop` are array-like

The function is wired into the module registration block alongside the
existing `linspace` entry so `fnp_python.geomspace` becomes callable
from Python consumers of the parity surface.

Also marks bead `franken_numpy-e3gs` ("numpy.geomspace python wrapper
parity") as `closed` in `.beads/issues.jsonl` with a refreshed
updated_at/closed_at and `close_reason="Completed"`, reflecting that
this passthrough wrapper lands the parity contract that bead was
tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
